name: OpenClaw
description: Local agent harness via the openclaw CLI. Routes to a configured agent with persistent session support. The OPENCLAW unit type in RepoCiv is a direct bypass to this harness — no cascade fallback.
auth: none (local binary, access controlled by binary presence)
model_selection: --model flag; user selects via UI model picker
note: OPENCLAW always routes directly to this harness regardless of the harness selector in the UI.

profile_binding.harness_ref_semantics: Agent id passed to --agent flag (e.g. 'main', 'reviewer', custom id from `openclaw agents list`). Use 'default' to omit --agent and use openclaw default.

identity_mode.native: Edit agent.md for the agent at ~/.openclaw/agents/<harness_ref>/agent.md

profile_binding.harness_options_note: Lists available agent ids; result is JSON array [{id, name, ...}]
